title: Data matching for Medicare and private health insurance
description: What to do if you get a data-matching letter about Medicare and private health you reported in your tax return.
keywords: data-matching, data matching medicare levy, data-matching medicare levy exemption

child_links.title: Medicare levy exemption letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data matching letter about your eligibility for the Medicare levy exemption.

child_links.title: Medicare levy surcharge letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data matching letter from us about Medicare levy surcharge (MLS).

child_links.title: Private health insurance rebate letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data matching letter from us about your private health insurance rebate (PHIR).
